SEARCH
Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.stage

Interface PreallocatedEmitter<T>

Type Parameters:
T - pooled item type
All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface PreallocatedEmitter<T> extends AutoCloseable
Emits objects claimed from a preallocated source pool.

A preallocated emitter has at most one outstanding claim at a time. Mutate the claimed object, then call one of the emit methods. If a timed or non-blocking emit returns false, the claim is still outstanding; retry the emit or call discard(Object) before claiming another object.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    claim()
    Claims the next reusable item from the source pool.
    void
    close()
    Closes the source and prevents further claims or emits.
    void
    discard(T item)
    Releases an outstanding claim without publishing the item.
    void
    emit(T item)
    Emits a claimed item, blocking according to the source edge policy.
    boolean
    emit(T item, Duration timeout)
    Attempts to emit a claimed item before the timeout expires.
    boolean
    isClosed()
    Returns whether this emitter has been closed.
    String
    name()
    Returns the source name this emitter publishes through.
    int
    poolSize()
    Returns the configured source pool size.
    int
    reuseBound()
    Returns the minimum number of in-flight items the runtime determined for this source topology.
    boolean
    tryEmit(T item)
    Attempts to emit a claimed item without waiting.

  • Method Details

    • name

      String name()
      Returns the source name this emitter publishes through.

    • claim

      T claim()
      Claims the next reusable item from the source pool.
      Returns:
      item owned by the caller until emitted or discarded
      Throws:
      GraphRuntimeException - if an earlier claim is still outstanding

    • emit

      void emit(T item)
      Emits a claimed item, blocking according to the source edge policy.

      The claim is cleared when this method returns or throws.

    • emit

      boolean emit(T item, Duration timeout)
      Attempts to emit a claimed item before the timeout expires.
      Returns:
      true if emitted; false if the item is still claimed and must be retried or discarded

    • tryEmit

      boolean tryEmit(T item)
      Attempts to emit a claimed item without waiting.
      Returns:
      true if emitted; false if the item is still claimed and must be retried or discarded

    • discard

      void discard(T item)
      Releases an outstanding claim without publishing the item.

    • poolSize

      int poolSize()
      Returns the configured source pool size.

    • reuseBound

      int reuseBound()
      Returns the minimum number of in-flight items the runtime determined for this source topology. The pool size is always greater than this value.

    • isClosed

      boolean isClosed()
      Returns whether this emitter has been closed.

    • close

      void close()
      Closes the source and prevents further claims or emits.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
